description: Autonomous AI agent that reads agent trust scores from the ShadowKey reputation engine and attests trusted agents on-chain via gasless transactions. Operates without human approval of individual attestations.

erc8004.note: ERC-8004 agent identity — operator wallet is the registered identity anchor

supported_tools.name: supabase_query
supported_tools.description: Read agent trust scores from the ShadowKey reputation database

supported_tools.name: ethereum_transaction
supported_tools.description: Submit on-chain attestations via ethers.js (gasPrice=0 on Status Network)

supported_tools.name: status_network_rpc
supported_tools.description: Connect to Status Network Sepolia RPC for gasless transaction submission

supported_tools.name: shadowkey_sdk
supported_tools.description: ShadowKey Agent SDK for vault access requests and status polling

supported_tools.name: erc8128_signer
supported_tools.description: RFC 9421 HTTP Message Signatures — signs each API request with Ethereum key

decision_loop.discover: Read agent list and trust scores from Supabase reputation engine
decision_loop.plan: Evaluate each agent against trust threshold (score >= 70 = TRUSTED)
decision_loop.execute: Submit attest(agentAddress, trustScore) with gasPrice=0 to Status Network
decision_loop.verify: Confirm transaction receipt and log explorer URL
decision_loop.submit: Update agent log with all decisions and transaction proofs

safety_guardrails: Validates agent address is non-zero before submitting transaction
Explicit gasLimit prevents runaway gas consumption
Trust threshold enforced at contract level (cannot be bypassed client-side)
Read-only Supabase access for score fetching (no write permissions)
Aborts full run on 3+ consecutive transaction failures
5-minute timestamp window on ERC-8128 signatures (prevents replay attacks)
Content-Digest header verifies request body integrity
tracks: Protocol Labs — Let the Agent Cook
